commentary: Ten activities this week versus eleven last week, so technically one fewer, but let's not pretend that number tells the whole story when you doubled up on three separate days like some kind of gorgeous overachiever. The swimming is looking genuinely impressive — four sessions of two kilometres or more, and that Wednesday morning effort at 149 bpm average means you were actually working, not just floating around looking cute in the jockstrap. The run club on Friday was a solid 13.1km, slightly shorter than last week's zoo run but you kept showing up, which is the whole game. The one thing worth clocking is that Sunday gap before the Monday swim — rest is not the enemy, but two full days off after a big Friday and nothing Saturday is a pattern worth watching if it becomes a habit of running hot then going cold.
